name: Later Social Media Scheduling API
what_it_does: Later social media scheduling REST API for brands, creators, and agencies to visually plan, schedule, and publish content across Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, and Pinterest with link-in-bio landing page and analytics. Enables AI agents to manage visual content calendar and post scheduling for multi-platform social publishing automation, handle Instagram grid preview and visual planning for brand aesthetic automation, access auto-publish and first-comment scheduling for Instagram automation, retrieve best time to post recommendations from analytics for scheduling optimization automation, manage link-in-bio (Linkin.bio) landing page and UTM tracking for traffic attribution automation, handle media library organization and hashtag suggestion for content workflow automation, access analytics and post performance reporting for content strategy automation, retrieve multi-profile workspace and team collaboration for agency publishing automation, manage story and reel scheduling for short-form video automation, and integrate Later with Canva, Unsplash, Google Drive, and Dropbox for end-to-end social content workflow.
use_cases: Scheduling Instagram posts from visual calendar planning agents
Auto-publishing across platforms from multi-channel scheduling agents
Tracking link-in-bio traffic from attribution analytics agents
Managing creator content calendars from agency scheduling agents
not_for: Enterprise social management with complex approval workflows (use Sprout Social or Sprinklr)
Deep social analytics and competitive benchmarking (use Iconosquare or Rival IQ)
Social customer care and inbox management
best_when: A brand, creator, or agency wanting AI agents to automate visual social content scheduling, Instagram grid planning, link-in-bio management, and cross-platform publishing through Later's visual social platform.
avoid_when: INSTAGRAM AUTO-PUBLISH vs PUSH NOTIFICATION DISTINCTION: Instagram auto-publish is available for feed posts but some content types (carousel, first account posts) may require push notification publish for new accounts; automated publishing workflows must verify auto-publish eligibility for content type and account status; automated scheduling that assumes auto-publish for all post types creates manual intervention requirement. META PLATFORM POLICY CHANGES AFFECTING AUTO-PUBLISH: Meta periodically adjusts Instagram API auto-publish permissions and approved use cases; automated publishing workflows must monitor Meta API policy updates; automation built on current auto-publish capability may require re-authorization if Meta changes approved publisher partner requirements. LINKIN.BIO LINK MANAGEMENT FOR TIME-SENSITIVE CAMPAIGNS: Later's Linkin.bio landing page link management is separate from post scheduling; automated campaign workflow must coordinate post scheduling and Linkin.bio link updates; scheduled posts referencing link-in-bio must have corresponding landing page links updated before post publishes.

auth.notes: Later uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. REST API with JSON. Vancouver, Canada HQ. Founded 2014 as Latergramme by Matt Smith and Cindy Wen. Rebranded to Later. Backed by Georgian, BDC Capital. Products: Social scheduling, visual content calendar, Instagram grid preview, Linkin.bio, analytics, media library. Platforms: Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, Pinterest. GDPR. CASL. Serves 7M+ users. Competes with Planoly, Loomly, and Hootsuite for social scheduling.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free Starter plan (1 social set, 30 posts/month, limited analytics)
pricing.paid_tiers: Starter (free), Growth ($18/mo, 1 set), Advanced ($40/mo), Agency ($80/mo); annual discount
pricing.notes: Vancouver Canada. Georgian-backed. Free Starter + paid tiers. Monthly/annual billing. No credit card for free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; publishing and analytics queries throttled; webhooks for post publishing, error, and analytics events

known_agent_gotchas: SOCIAL PROFILE PLATFORM TOKEN EXPIRY MANAGEMENT: Later connects social profiles via platform OAuth; Instagram/Meta tokens expire after 60 days without activity; automated publishing workflows must monitor token expiry and trigger re-authorization before token invalidation breaks scheduled post publishing

MEDIA UPLOAD SIZE AND FORMAT REQUIREMENTS BY PLATFORM: Later enforces platform-specific media requirements (Instagram image ratio, video duration, TikTok resolution); automated content scheduling must validate media specifications before upload; automated media upload without format validation creates publishing failure at scheduled time rather than upload time

POST SCHEDULING TIMEZONE HANDLING FOR GLOBAL CAMPAIGNS: Later scheduling uses account timezone setting; automated multi-timezone campaign scheduling must account for account timezone configuration; automated scheduling using UTC times without timezone conversion creates posts published at wrong local time for regional campaigns

ANALYTICS DATA FRESHNESS FOR AUTOMATED REPORTING: Later analytics data aggregates platform metrics with 24-48 hour delay; automated performance reporting using Later analytics must account for data latency; automated same-day post performance reports may return incomplete or zero metrics for recent publications

FIRST COMMENT AUTO-POSTING PLATFORM AVAILABILITY: Later's first comment scheduling (for hashtags below Instagram posts) requires Instagram Business/Creator account; automated first comment scheduling must verify account type; automated first comment scheduling on Personal Instagram accounts creates silent scheduling failure without error
agent_readiness.security_notes: Social scheduling. GDPR, CASL. OAuth2. CA/US. Social content, publishing, and analytics data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Social scheduling. GDPR, CASL. OAuth2. CA/US. Social content and publishing data.
